rulings.Case Title: THIRD BAPTIST GARDENS, INCORPORATED VS. STEPHANIE SHIVER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 7, 2019 line 13. DEFENDANT STEPHANIE SHIVER DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED. Plaintiff is not required to attach a copy of the lease or any addenda or attachments to the lease pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure section 1166(d)(1)(B)(iii) because this is an unlawful detainer for nonpayment of rent under Code of Civil Procedure section 1161(2). =(501/CFH)
